artifacts.label: Gap decision ledger
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr reports gap-ledger --repo-exposure target/ripr/reports/repo-exposure.json --out inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out-md inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.md

artifacts.label: PR repair cards
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr review-comments --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/boundary-gap --base origin/main --head HEAD --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out target/ripr/review/comments.json

artifacts.label: Agent repair packet
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr agent packet --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/boundary-gap --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --gap-id gap:pr:pricing:threshold-boundary --json > target/ripr/workflow/agent-packet.json

artifacts.label: Gate decision
artifacts.regeneration_command: ripr gate evaluate --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out target/ripr/reports/gate-decision.json --out-md target/ripr/reports/gate-decision.md

authority.boundary: Pass/fail authority remains with explicit gate-decision artifacts when configured; this first-run packet does not gate.

commands.agent_packet: ripr agent packet --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/boundary-gap --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --gap-id gap:pr:pricing:threshold-boundary --json > target/ripr/workflow/agent-packet.json
commands.regenerate_gap_ledger: ripr reports gap-ledger --repo-exposure target/ripr/reports/repo-exposure.json --out inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --out-md inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.md

limits: Does not edit source or generate tests.
Does not change CI blocking or gate policy.

selected.agent_packet_command: ripr agent packet --root fixtures/first_successful_pr/boundary-gap --gap-ledger inputs/reports/gap-decision-ledger.json --gap-id gap:pr:pricing:threshold-boundary --json > target/ripr/workflow/agent-packet.json
selected.current_evidence_strength: Static evidence found related Rust test context, but the current proof is weak because the discriminator is missing.
selected.focused_proof_intent: Add a focused boundary assertion in `tests/pricing.rs`: `assert_eq!(discount(100, 100), 90)`.
selected.missing_discriminator: Equality-boundary assertion for the changed behavior.
selected.static_evidence_boundary: static advisory evidence only; not runtime proof, coverage adequacy, mutation confirmation, gate approval, or merge approval.
selected.why: A related Rust test reaches this change, but no equality-boundary assertion was found for the changed behavior.
